recommendations.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training

recommendations.title: Bad Hair Day
recommendations.overview: Monica is desperate to be prom queen, but on the big night, her hair is an uncontrollable mess. Meanwhile, FBI agent Liz Morgan is on the hunt for a jewel thief who is looking for a stolen necklace, which Monica has in her possession. Soon, she and t

recommendations.title: Deidra & Laney Rob a Train
recommendations.overview: After their mother ends up in jail, two sisters turn to train robbery in order to support their family.

recommendations.title: Police Academy 4: Citizens on Patrol
recommendations.overview: A new batch of recruits arrives at Police Academy, this time a group of civilian volunteers who have joined Commandant Lassard's new Citizens on Patrol program. Although the community relations project has strong governmental support, a disgusted Cap

recommendations.title: Belleville Cop
recommendations.overview: When a childhood friend from Miami gets killed after he comes to warn of encroaching drug gangs, Baaba moves to Miami and teams up with a local officer to bring down the criminals.

recommendations.title: Ugly Nasty People
recommendations.overview: Four physically disabled lowlifes plot the perfect heist, but things go south when each reveals an agenda of their own.

recommendations.title: A Fish Called Wanda
recommendations.overview: While a diamond advocate attempts to steal a collection of diamonds, troubles arise when he realises he’s not the only one after the collection.

recommendations.title: Excess Baggage
recommendations.overview: A rich brat fakes her own kidnapping, but in the process ends up locked in the trunk of a car that gets stolen.

recommendations.title: 12 Chairs
